title: Quarter 3 2022: Employees and Team of the Quarter
summary: We are pleased to announce our award winners for Employees of the Quarter and Team of the Quarter for Quarter 3, July – September 2022! Employees of the Quarter Wilsa Sinnok – Head Start Program Specialist, Shishmaref “I would like to recommend that Wilsa Sinnok receive this award. She has helped our program make the big move from an older building to the new Shishmaref Head Start building. She has been acting for other Program Specialists when out, and has even stepped into our classrooms, so that classrooms in Shishmaref will not cancel. In orde...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: October 13, 2022
summary: October 13, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase by a slightly lower rate from last week of 8.59% , from the level on 10/06/2022 of 5.629 M km 2 to 6.158 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resources...
